svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.0.3 Chrome/140.0.7339.249 Electron/38.7.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.0.3" scale="1" border="5"> <diagram id="ja_biztown_3.0_—_immersive_ux_" name="JA BizTown 3.0 — Immersive UX Design Philosophy"> <mxGraphModel dx="1106" dy="762" grid="1" gridSize="10"
